rule.name: utilize soft picky
rule.message: Prefer "use" in plain style.

rule.name: utilise soft picky
rule.message: Prefer "use" in plain style.

rule.name: facilitate soft picky
rule.message: Consider "help" or "make easier".

rule.name: leverage soft picky
rule.message: Consider "use" instead of corporate "leverage".

rule.name: impactful soft picky
rule.message: Consider "effective" or "powerful".

rule.name: actionable soft picky
rule.message: Consider "practical" or "usable".

rule.name: synergy soft picky
rule.message: Corporate jargon; consider plain wording.

rule.name: circle back soft picky
rule.message: Consider "follow up" or "return to".

rule.name: touch base soft picky
rule.message: Consider "talk" or "check in".

rule.name: at the end of the day soft picky
rule.message: Consider "ultimately" or "finally".

rule.name: going forward soft picky
rule.message: Consider "in the future" or "from now on".

rule.name: very very picky
rule.message: Possible weak intensification; consider a stronger word.

rule.name: things soft picky
rule.message: Consider a more specific noun than "things".

rule.name: stuff soft picky
rule.message: Vague "and stuff"; consider a clearer ending.

rule.name: preventative soft picky
rule.message: Prefer "preventive" in many style guides.

rule.name: bandwidth soft picky
rule.message: Corporate jargon for capacity; consider "time" or "capacity".

rule.name: low hanging fruit soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "easy wins" or name the tasks.

rule.name: move the needle soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "make a difference" or "improve results".

rule.name: deep dive soft picky
rule.message: Consider "detailed look" or "thorough review".

rule.name: key takeaway soft picky
rule.message: Consider "main point" or "conclusion".

rule.name: ideate soft picky
rule.message: Consider "brainstorm" or "think of ideas".

rule.name: synergize soft picky
rule.message: Consider "work together" or "combine efforts".

rule.name: paradigm shift soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "major change" or name the change.

rule.name: best of breed soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "best" or "leading".

rule.name: value-add soft picky
rule.message: Consider "benefit" or "extra value".

rule.name: win-win soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "mutually beneficial".

rule.name: boil the ocean soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "overly ambitious" or name the scope problem.

rule.name: reach out soft picky
rule.message: Consider "contact" or "email" when more specific.

rule.name: thought leadership soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "expertise" or "ideas".

rule.name: drill down soft picky
rule.message: Consider "examine" or "look into".

rule.name: align on soft picky
rule.message: Consider "agree on" or "decide".

rule.name: pushback soft picky
rule.message: Consider "resistance" or "objections".

rule.name: take offline soft picky
rule.message: Consider "discuss separately" or "follow up later".

rule.name: runway soft picky
rule.message: Corporate "runway" for cash; consider "cash runway" or "months of funding" if unclear.

rule.name: north star soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "primary metric" or name the measure.

rule.name: double-click soft picky
rule.message: Consider "examine" or "look closely" outside UI contexts.

rule.name: sync up soft picky
rule.message: Consider "meet" or "catch up".

rule.name: circle back on soft picky
rule.message: Consider "revisit" or "follow up on".

rule.name: loop in soft picky
rule.message: Consider "include" or "inform".

rule.name: table this soft picky
rule.message: Ambiguous US/UK; prefer "postpone" or "put on the agenda".

rule.name: action items soft picky
rule.message: Consider "tasks" or "next steps".

rule.name: net new soft picky
rule.message: Consider "new" or "additional".

rule.name: hard stop soft picky
rule.message: Consider "deadline" or "must end by".

rule.name: move the goalposts soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "change the criteria" or name the change.

rule.name: put a pin in soft picky
rule.message: Consider "pause" or "revisit later".

rule.name: level set soft picky
rule.message: Consider "align" or "agree on the facts".

rule.name: in the weeds soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "in the details" or "bogged down".

rule.name: herding cats soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "coordinating" or name the difficulty.

rule.name: close the loop soft picky
rule.message: Consider "follow up" or "confirm completion".

rule.name: fail fast soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; consider "detect errors early" or name the practice.

rule.name: shift left soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "test earlier" or "move checks earlier".

rule.name: out of pocket soft picky
rule.message: Ambiguous jargon; consider "unavailable" or "paying myself".

rule.name: double down soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "commit further" or name the bet.

rule.name: lean in soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; consider "engage" or "focus more".

rule.name: wheelhouse soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "expertise" or "strengths".

rule.name: unpack soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; consider "analyze" or "discuss".

rule.name: skill set soft picky
rule.message: Consider "skills" when "set" adds little.

rule.name: socialize soft picky
rule.message: Corporate jargon; consider "share" or "discuss with".

rule.name: bias for action soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; consider "act promptly" or name the decision habit.

rule.name: future proof soft picky
rule.message: Vague claim; say how it stays maintainable.

rule.name: bake in soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "include" or "build in".

rule.name: right size soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "scale" or "adjust to need".

rule.name: move forward soft picky
rule.message: Filler; consider "continue" or name the next step.

rule.name: raise the bar soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "raise standards" or name the higher bar.

rule.name: think outside soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "think creatively" or name the constraint.

rule.name: ship it soft picky
rule.message: Vague slogan; name the release criteria.

rule.name: own it soft picky
rule.message: Vague; consider "take responsibility" or name the owner.

rule.name: circle the wagons soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "defend" or "unite under pressure".

rule.name: hit the ground running soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "start productively" or name the ramp-up.

rule.name: peel the onion soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "dig deeper" or "layer by layer".

rule.name: park that soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "defer" or "revisit later".

rule.name: table that soft picky
rule.message: Ambiguous jargon; consider "postpone" or "put forward".

rule.name: close of play soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "end of day" or name the deadline.

rule.name: game changer soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; name the concrete impact instead.

rule.name: push the envelope soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "stretch limits" or name the risk.

rule.name: skin in the game soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "shared risk" or name the stake.

rule.name: elephant in the room soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; name the awkward issue directly.

rule.name: ballpark figure soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "rough estimate" or give a range.

rule.name: on the same page soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "aligned" or name the shared goal.

rule.name: drink the kool-aid soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "accept uncritically" or name the belief.

rule.name: win-win situation soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; name the mutual benefit instead.

rule.name: think outside the box soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "think creatively" or name the constraint.

rule.name: no-brainer soft picky
rule.message: Cliché; consider "obvious choice" or name why it is easy.

rule.name: get after it soft picky
rule.message: Vague slogan; consider "start now" or name the next step.

rule.name: net-net soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "bottom line" or state the outcome.

rule.name: core competency soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "strength" or name the skill.

rule.name: value proposition soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "benefit" or name the offer.

rule.name: take this offline soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "discuss later" or "handle separately".

rule.name: stakeholder management soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "working with stakeholders" or name the work.

rule.name: single source of truth soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the canonical system instead.

rule.name: north star metric soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the primary metric instead.

rule.name: best practice soft picky
rule.message: Vague; name the concrete practice or standard.

rule.name: pain point soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the problem directly.

rule.name: learnings soft picky
rule.message: Consider "lessons" or "what we learned".

rule.name: deep dive into soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "examine" or "investigate".

rule.name: circle back later soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "revisit later" or name when.

rule.name: bandwidth constrained soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "short on time" or "at capacity".

rule.name: go to market soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the launch plan instead of "GTM".

rule.name: product market fit soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the evidence of demand instead.

rule.name: time to market soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the launch timeline instead.

rule.name: minimum viable product soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the smallest useful release instead of "MVP".

rule.name: proof of concept soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name what is being validated instead of "PoC".

rule.name: return on investment soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the benefit or payback instead of "ROI".

rule.name: total cost of ownership soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the full cost model instead of "TCO".

rule.name: key performance indicator soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the metric instead of "KPI".

rule.name: customer journey soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; describe the user path or steps instead.

rule.name: user persona soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; describe the real user segment instead.

rule.name: jobs to be done soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the user job or outcome instead of "JTBD".

rule.name: voice of the customer soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; cite the feedback or source instead of "VoC".

rule.name: design thinking soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the design method or steps instead.

rule.name: growth hacking soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the growth tactic instead.

rule.name: moonshot soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; name the ambitious goal concretely.

rule.name: blitzscaling soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; name the growth strategy and tradeoffs.

rule.name: 10x engineer soft picky
rule.message: Myth jargon; describe concrete skills or impact instead.

rule.name: fail forward soft picky
rule.message: Buzzword; name the learning or recovery plan instead.

rule.name: working backwards soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; describe the reverse-planning steps instead.

rule.name: customer obsession soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name the concrete customer outcome instead.

rule.name: ship early soft picky
rule.message: Vague slogan; name the release criteria instead.

rule.name: two pizza team soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the team size limit instead.

rule.name: think big soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name the ambitious scope instead.

rule.name: day one soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; describe the startup mindset concretely.

rule.name: disagree and commit soft picky
rule.message: Leadership slogan; name the decision process instead.

rule.name: earn trust soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name how trust is built instead.

rule.name: dive deep soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; consider "investigate thoroughly" or name the topic.

rule.name: insist on high standards soft picky
rule.message: Leadership slogan; name the quality bar instead.

rule.name: have backbone soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name the hard tradeoff instead.

rule.name: deliver results soft picky
rule.message: Vague slogan; name the outcome metrics instead.

rule.name: ownership mindset soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name who owns the work and how.

rule.name: customer centric soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the customer outcome instead.

rule.name: act small soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name the incremental action instead.

rule.name: customer first soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name the customer outcome instead.

rule.name: data driven soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the metric or evidence instead.

rule.name: full stack soft picky
rule.message: Vague label; name the concrete skills or layers.

rule.name: zero trust soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the access controls instead of the slogan.

rule.name: platform engineering soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the platform capabilities instead.

rule.name: outcome oriented soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the measurable outcome instead.

rule.name: developer experience soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the concrete developer friction or fix.

rule.name: paved road soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the standard path or defaults instead.

rule.name: golden path soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the recommended workflow instead.

rule.name: inner source soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; describe the internal open collaboration model.

rule.name: shift left testing soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name earlier test gates instead of the slogan.

rule.name: you build it you run it soft picky
rule.message: Slogan; name ownership of build and operations explicitly.

rule.name: cognitive load soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name what is hard to keep in mind instead.

rule.name: team topologies soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the team interaction model instead.

rule.name: shared nothing soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the isolation boundary instead.

rule.name: stream aligned soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the value-stream ownership instead.

rule.name: enabling team soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name how the team unblocks others instead.

rule.name: thinnest viable platform soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the minimal platform capabilities instead.

rule.name: complicated subsystem soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the specialized domain ownership instead.

rule.name: platform as a product soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name platform users, roadmap, and SLAs instead.

rule.name: inverse conway soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the org-structure change and target architecture.

rule.name: error budget soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the reliability allowance and policy instead.

rule.name: service ownership soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name who runs the service and on-call duties.

rule.name: reliability driven soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the objective and burn-rate policy instead.

rule.name: toil reduction soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the manual work being automated instead.

rule.name: blameless postmortem soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the learning goals of the review instead.

rule.name: incident commander soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the response role and duties instead.

rule.name: runbook driven soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the operational procedure instead.

rule.name: bus factor of one soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the single point of knowledge risk instead.

rule.name: team api soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the team interface and collaboration contract.

rule.name: on call rotation soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the paging schedule and ownership instead.

rule.name: follow the sun soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the multi-region handoff model instead.

rule.name: bus factor of two soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the knowledge-sharing risk instead.

rule.name: chaos engineering soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the failure-injection experiment instead.

rule.name: mean time to recover soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the recovery metric (MTTR) concretely.

rule.name: mean time to detect soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the detection metric (MTTD) concretely.

rule.name: game day soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the reliability exercise instead.

rule.name: tabletop exercise soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the scenario walkthrough instead.

rule.name: disaster recovery drill soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the recovery test objectives instead.

rule.name: war room soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the incident coordination space instead.

rule.name: bridge call soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the incident conference call instead.

rule.name: bus factor of three soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the knowledge-sharing coverage instead.

rule.name: canary deployment soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the progressive rollout plan instead.

rule.name: hot spare soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the standby capacity instead.

rule.name: cold spare soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the offline reserve capacity instead.

rule.name: blue green deployment soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the dual-environment cutover plan instead.

rule.name: rolling update soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the phased rollout strategy instead.

rule.name: feature flag soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the toggle and rollout criteria instead.

rule.name: dark launch soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the hidden production exposure plan instead.

rule.name: shadow traffic soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the mirrored production load plan instead.

rule.name: progressive delivery soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the staged release controls instead.

rule.name: traffic splitting soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the routing percentages instead.

rule.name: holdout group soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the control cohort and purpose instead.

rule.name: feature freeze soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the change-control window instead.

rule.name: kill switch soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the emergency disable control instead.

rule.name: circuit breaker soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the failure isolation policy instead.

rule.name: bulkhead pattern soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the resource isolation boundary instead.

rule.name: retry storm soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the cascading retry overload instead.

rule.name: thundering herd soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the synchronized wake/retry pileup instead.

rule.name: backoff strategy soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the retry delay policy instead.

rule.name: rate limiting soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the throughput cap and policy instead.

rule.name: load shedding soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name which work is dropped under pressure.

rule.name: graceful degradation soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name which features reduce under failure.

rule.name: idempotency key soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the dedupe token and scope instead.

rule.name: exactly once soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the delivery guarantee and limits instead.

rule.name: at least once soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the delivery guarantee and retry policy instead.

rule.name: dead letter queue soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the failed-message holding queue instead.

rule.name: poison pill soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the terminal/bad message pattern instead.

rule.name: outbox pattern soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the transactional publish design instead.

rule.name: saga pattern soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the multi-step compensation workflow instead.

rule.name: event sourcing soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the append-only state model instead.

rule.name: cqrs pattern soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the split read/write model instead.

rule.name: strangler fig soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the incremental replacement approach instead.

rule.name: anti corruption layer soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the integration translation boundary instead.

rule.name: bounded context soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the domain model boundary instead.

rule.name: context map soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the domain relationship diagram instead.

rule.name: ubiquitous language soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the shared domain vocabulary instead.

rule.name: domain event soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the business fact being recorded instead.

rule.name: aggregate root soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the consistency boundary object instead.

rule.name: value object soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the immutable domain value instead.

rule.name: entity service soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the CRUD-centric service risk instead.

rule.name: hexagonal architecture soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the ports-and-adapters structure instead.

rule.name: ports and adapters soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the boundary interfaces and drivers instead.

rule.name: shared kernel soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the shared model and ownership rules instead.

rule.name: clean architecture soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the dependency-rule layering instead.

rule.name: onion architecture soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the concentric domain layering instead.

rule.name: screaming architecture soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name package structure that reveals the domain.

rule.name: dependency inversion soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the abstraction-depends-on rule instead.

rule.name: interface segregation soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the narrow interface split instead.

rule.name: single responsibility soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the one-reason-to-change rule instead.

rule.name: open closed principle soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the open-for-extension rule instead.

rule.name: liskov substitution soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the subtype contract rule instead.

rule.name: composition over inheritance soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the prefer-has-a design guidance instead.

rule.name: law of demeter soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the only-talk-to-friends rule instead.

rule.name: tell dont ask soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name command-over-query object design instead.

rule.name: separation of concerns soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name distinct responsibility boundaries instead.

rule.name: information hiding soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name encapsulating internal details instead.

rule.name: yagni soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the avoid-unused-features rule instead.

rule.name: hollywood principle soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the dont-call-us inversion instead.

rule.name: dry principle soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the avoid-duplication rule instead.

rule.name: kiss principle soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the keep-it-simple rule instead.

rule.name: boy scout rule soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name leave-the-code-cleaner instead.

rule.name: broken windows soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name fix small defects early instead.

rule.name: cap theorem soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the consistency-availability tradeoff instead.

rule.name: rule of three soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name wait-for-three-examples before abstracting.

rule.name: eventual consistency soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name delayed-convergence data model instead.

rule.name: acid properties soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name atomic durable transaction guarantees instead.

rule.name: two generals soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name the unreliable-link consensus problem instead.

rule.name: byzantine fault soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name arbitrary-failure consensus risk instead.

rule.name: flaky test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a nondeterministic failing test instead.

rule.name: golden master soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name characterization snapshot testing instead.

rule.name: characterization test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name lock-down existing behavior tests instead.

rule.name: property based soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name generative invariant testing instead.

rule.name: mutation testing soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name deliberate-fault test quality checks instead.

rule.name: contract test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name consumer-provider API compatibility checks instead.

rule.name: smoke test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a shallow health check suite instead.

rule.name: fuzz testing soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name random-input robustness testing instead.

rule.name: regression test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a check that old bugs stay fixed instead.

rule.name: load test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a capacity under expected traffic check instead.

rule.name: stress test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a beyond-capacity resilience check instead.

rule.name: end to end soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a full-path user journey check instead.

rule.name: integration test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a multi-component boundary check instead.

rule.name: unit test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a single-function isolation check instead.

rule.name: acceptance test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a stakeholder criteria check instead.

rule.name: performance test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a latency and throughput check instead.

rule.name: penetration test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name an authorized security attack drill instead.

rule.name: sanity test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a basic post-change smoke check instead.

rule.name: benchmark test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a timed comparative performance run instead.

rule.name: usability test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a real-user task success study instead.

rule.name: compatibility test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a cross-version interop check instead.

rule.name: accessibility test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name an assistive-tech usability check instead.

rule.name: security test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name an adversarial control validation instead.

rule.name: reliability test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a sustained uptime failure check instead.

rule.name: resilience test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a recovery-under-stress check instead.

rule.name: compliance test soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a policy and regulation evidence check instead.

rule.name: test pyramid soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a many-unit few-e2e test mix instead.

rule.name: test double soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a stand-in collaborator in tests instead.

rule.name: mock object soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a behavior-verifying test stand-in instead.

rule.name: stub object soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a canned-response test stand-in instead.

rule.name: fake object soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a working lightweight stand-in instead.

rule.name: spy object soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a partial real-object test wrapper instead.

rule.name: factory method soft picky
rule.message: Jargon; name a creation-via-function pattern instead.

rule.name: builder pattern soft picky
